title: Enhance model scout descriptions with architecture/benchmarks

log.context: Enhance model scout descriptions with architecture/benchmarks

Both files pass. Here's what changed:

**`scout_local.py`**

- New `extract_model_card_details(hf_detail)` function — parses the raw HF API response for:
  - `architecture` — from `cardData.model_type`, `cardData.architecture`, or `config.model_type`
  - `base_model` — what it was fine-tuned from (if applicable)
  - `training_tags` — DPO, RLHF, ORPO, SFT, instruct, GGUF/AWQ/GPTQ quantization markers
  - `datasets` — what training data was used
  - `languages` — multilingual support
  - `license`...(truncated)
